result.summary: Found 2 major layout/styling issues: game titles are being cut off mid-word in two sections, and the rightmost game tiles appear to have content clipped.

issues.description: Game titles in 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' section are truncated - 'MAGNI' (likely 'MAGNIFICENT PHOENIX'), 'MUNC' (likely 'MUNCHER' or similar) are cut off
issues.suggestion: Ensure game card titles have adequate width and text wrapping is enabled, or implement proper carousel scrolling to show full content without truncation

issues.description: Game titles in 'Top Played New Games' section are truncated - 'Hyperc' (likely 'HYPERCASH'), 'Dark' (likely 'DARK DEPTHS') are cut off at the right edge
issues.suggestion: Review the grid/carousel layout to ensure all game cards display completely. Add horizontal scrolling indicators or adjust grid columns to fit content properly

issues.description: Inconsistent game card sizing or overflow hidden property is clipping game titles on the right side of both sections
issues.suggestion: Apply consistent padding/margins to all game cards and verify that overflow properties don't hide content that should be visible
